code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{db}from'../firebase';import{collection,getDocs}from'firebase/firestore';import{JOB_ICONS}from'../constants';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Members(){const[members,setMembers]=useState([]);const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{const fetchMembers=async()=>{const snapshot=await getDocs(collection(db,'users'));const list=snapshot.docs.map(doc=>({id:doc.id,...doc.data()}));setMembers(list.filter(m=>m.charName));};fetchMembers();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{backgroundColor:'#1a1a2e',minHeight:'100vh',color:'white',padding:'20px',maxWidth:'600px',margin:'0 auto'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:()=>navigate('/'),style:btnStyle('#555'),children:"\u2190 Home"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{style:{marginTop:'20px'},children:"\uD83D\uDC65 Membri della gilda"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{style:{color:'#aaa',marginBottom:'20px'},children:[members.length," membri registrati"]}),members.map((m,i)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{backgroundColor:'#16213e',borderRadius:'10px',padding:'15px 20px',marginBottom:'12px',borderLeft:'5px solid #9b59b6'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{style:{margin:'0 0 8px 0'},children:m.charName}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{style:{margin:'0 0 6px 0',color:'#aaa',fontSize:'0.9rem'},children:["\uD83C\uDFAD Ruolo: ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{style:{color:'white'},children:m.role})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{display:'flex',flexWrap:'wrap',gap:'8px',marginTop:'8px'},children:(m.jobs||(m.job?[m.job]:[])).map(job=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{style:{backgroundColor:'#0f3460',padding:'4px 12px',borderRadius:'20px',fontSize:'0.85rem'},children:[JOB_ICONS[job]||'⚔️'," ",job]},job))})]},i))]});}const btnStyle=color=>({padding:'8px 15px',backgroundColor:color,color:'white',border:'none',borderRadius:'6px',cursor:'pointer',fontSize:'0.9rem'});export default Members;
